features.description: Streaming engine and refreshable MV detection functions exist and correctly identify Kafka/NATS/RabbitMQ/S3Queue engines and MVs with REFRESH clause

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'pub fn is_streaming_engine' src/restore/topo.rs && grep -n 'pub fn is_refreshable_mv' src/restore/topo.rs
layers.fail_message: Detection functions not found in src/restore/topo.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding detection functions

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure utility functions with no runtime side effects -- correctness fully covered by unit tests

alternative_verification.command: cargo test --lib test_is_streaming_engine test_is_refreshable_mv 2>&1 | grep 'test result'

features.description: classify_restore_tables() populates postponed_tables for streaming engines and refreshable MVs instead of data_tables/ddl_only_tables

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: classify_restore_tables does not push to postponed_tables

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --lib test_classify_streaming_engines_postponed test_classify_refreshable_mv_postponed test_classify_all_streaming_engines test_classify_restore_tables_basic -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -5

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure classification function -- correctness verified by unit tests; runtime behavior covered by F003

alternative_verification.command: cargo test --lib test_classify_streaming_engines_postponed test_classify_refreshable_mv_postponed test_classify_all_streaming_engines 2>&1 | grep 'test result'

layers.name: behavioral

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for src/restore module with Phase 2b documentation

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: grep -q 'Parent Context' src/restore/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Directory Structure' src/restore/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Key Patterns' src/restore/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Parent Rules' src/restore/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'is_streaming_engine' src/restore/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'is_refreshable_mv' src/restore/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Phase 2b' src/restore/CLAUDE.md && echo VALID
